notificationPreferences.title: Notifications
notificationPreferences.description: Account and Security notifications are always sent by email and cannot be changed.

notificationsPage.title: Notifications
notificationsPage.subtitle: Review recent account and workspace activity.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update the name shown across your workspace.

avatar.label: Profile picture
avatar.dropzoneHint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP up to 25 MB.
avatar.cropDescription: Drag to reposition, pinch or scroll to zoom.

errors.tooLarge: That image is too large. Try a smaller file.
errors.unsupportedFormat: Use a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
errors.removeFailed: Could not remove the profile picture.

avatar.removeConfirmDescription: Your avatar will go back to your initials.

email.title: Email
email.description: Change the address used for sign-in and account alerts.
email.newHint: We'll send a confirmation link to the new address.

pending.title: Confirmation pending
pending.body: We sent a link to {email}. Check your email to complete the change.

loading.title: Confirming email change
loading.description: Please wait while we verify the confirmation link.

success.title: Email updated
success.description: Your new email address is ready to use.

error.title: Invalid or expired link
error.description: Request a fresh confirmation link from Email settings.

idle.title: Confirm email change
idle.description: Paste the confirmation token from your email to finish the change.

confirmEmailChange.tokenPlaceholder: Paste the token from your email

password.title: Password
password.description: Use a strong password that you do not use elsewhere.

export.title: Export personal data
export.description: Download a JSON file with all data we hold about you.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
delete.confirmDescription: This permanently removes your account and all associated data.

blocking.title: Action needed before you can delete your account
blocking.description: You still own the organizations below. Transfer ownership or delete each one, then come back and try again. "Sole owner" rows have no other owners to inherit access — those have to be transferred or the organization deleted.

pending.title: Pending legal updates
pending.description: New versions of these documents are available. Please review and accept them.

accepted.title: Legal documents you've accepted
accepted.description: A record of every legal document version you've accepted, with timestamps.
accepted.empty: You haven't accepted any legal documents yet.
accepted.loadError: Couldn't load your acceptances. Refresh to try again.

sheet.loadError: Couldn't load this document. Close the panel and try again.
sheet.notFound: This version is no longer available from the server. Your acceptance record is still on file.
sheet.acknowledge: I have read and accept the {title}.
sheet.acceptError: We couldn't record your acceptance. Refresh and try again.

disabled.title: Two-factor authentication
disabled.description: Add a second step to your sign-in for an extra layer of security.
disabled.explainer: We'll ask for a code from your authenticator app the next time you sign in.

scan.title: Scan with your authenticator
scan.description: Use Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, or any TOTP app.
scan.manualPrompt: Can't scan? Enter this code manually:

confirm.title: Confirm with a code
confirm.description: Enter the 6-digit code shown in your authenticator app right now.

codes.title: Save your recovery codes
codes.description: Each code works once. Store them somewhere safe, they will not be shown again.
codes.acknowledge: I have saved my recovery codes

enabled.title: Two-factor authentication
enabled.description: You'll be asked for a code at every sign-in.

regenerate.title: Recovery codes
regenerate.description: Lost access to your codes? Generate a new set. Old codes stop working.

dialog.title: Regenerate recovery codes?
dialog.description: Your existing recovery codes will stop working immediately. Enter your password and a current code to confirm.

result.title: New recovery codes
result.description: Your old recovery codes have been invalidated. Save these new codes, they will not be shown again.
result.acknowledge: I have saved my new recovery codes

disableCard.title: Turn off two-factor
disableCard.description: Removes the second step from sign-in. You can turn it back on later.

dialog.title: Turn off two-factor authentication?
dialog.description: Sign-in will no longer require a second step. You can re-enable it later. Enter your password and a current code to confirm.
